# disabled

**Type Property**

The shared disabled log.

## Declaration

```swift
static let disabled: OSLog
```

## Discussion

Passing this constant to an `os_log` function prevents the system from logging a message.

## Getting the Shared Logs

- **default**: The shared default log.
title: disabled
